job_description:
We are looking for a senior, hands-on Agentic AI Solution Architect who can consult, design, and finalize the end-to-end solution architecture and scope of work for an enterprise-grade Agentic AI platform.
Location: DHA Phase 4 Lahore, Pakistan
Timings: 5pm-2am PKT (Fulltime, onsite)
This role is NOT about coding everything.
It is about:
Asking the right questions
Defining what should be built vs what should not
Designing a secure, scalable, cloud-native agentic architecture
Producing clear solution artifacts that engineering teams can execute on
What You Will Own (Scope of Work)
Business Discovery & Problem Framing
Work with stakeholders to:
Understand current processes, pain points, and automation opportunities
Identify where agentic AI truly adds value vs simple automation
Convert ambiguous ideas into:
Clear use cases
Agent responsibilities
Success metrics (accuracy, cost, latency, risk)
Deliverables:
Problem statements
Use-case prioritization
Agent responsibility matrix
Agentic AI System Design
Design multi-agent workflows including:
Task planning agents
Reasoning agents
Execution agents
Validation / guardrail agents
Decide when to use:
Deterministic workflows vs agent-driven flows
Human-in-the-loop vs autonomous execution
Deliverables:
Agent interaction diagrams
Decision trees & control flows
Cloud & AI Architecture (AWS-Centric)
You will design (not just recommend) the architecture using:
Core Stack
Amazon Bedrock
Model selection strategy (Claude, Nova, Titan, etc.)
Prompt orchestration & guardrails
Amazon Nova
Agent orchestration & reasoning layers
AWS Lambda
Event-driven execution
Tool calling by agents
Amazon Textract
Document ingestion & structured extraction
Amazon Bedrock Data Automation (BDA)
Knowledge grounding
Vectorization & retrieval
OpenAI models
Use-case based comparison vs Bedrock models
Hybrid model strategy (cost, latency, accuracy)
Deliverables:
High-level architecture diagram
Data flow & security model
Model selection rationale
Tooling, Integrations & Data Strategy
Define how agents will:
Call internal tools
Invoke APIs
Query databases
Handle documents & unstructured data
Design RAG vs Agentic Retrieval strategy
Define:
Prompt versioning
Memory (short-term vs long-term)
Context boundaries
Deliverables:
Tool invocation strategy
Data & memory architecture
Integration map
Governance, Security & Risk Controls
Define:
Role-based access
Prompt & output guardrails
Audit logging
Cost controls
Address:
Hallucination risks
Data leakage
Model drift
Deliverables:
AI governance checklist
Risk mitigation plan
Scope Definition & Delivery Blueprint
This is the most critical output.
You will:
Break the solution into phases
Phase 1: MVP
Phase 2: Scale
Phase 3: Autonomy & optimization
Define:
In-scope vs out-of-scope
Team roles required (Dev, MLOps, Cloud, QA)
Time & effort estimates (high-level)
Deliverables:
Final Scope of Work (SoW)
Phased roadmap
Delivery-ready architecture pack
Required Profile (Non-Negotiable)
Background
3+ years experience across:
Solution Architecture
AI/ML systems
Automation platforms
Has designed systems, not just implemented them
AI & Agentic Expertise
Proven experience with:
LLM-based systems
Multi-agent orchestration
Prompt engineering at scale
Strong understanding of:
When NOT to use agents
Trade-offs between agents, workflows, and APIs
Cloud & AWS
Deep hands-on knowledge of:
AWS (Lambda, IAM, S3, VPC)
Amazon Bedrock ecosystem
Event-driven architectures
Able to reason about cost, latency, and scalability
Business & Communication
Can:
Translate business problems into technical solutions
Push back diplomatically on unrealistic expectations
Communicate clearly with executives and engineers
Nice to Have (Strong Plus)
Previous consulting or pre-sales architecture experience
Experience designing AI CoE or platform teams
Familiarity with:
LangGraph / LangChain
Agent frameworks
Enterprise RPA + AI convergence
Experience in regulated or enterprise environments
Requirements added by the job poster
• 3+ years of work experience with Amazon Web Services (AWS)
• 2+ years of work experience with AWS Lambda

Company Description
Mindlox is a software development company specializing in creating scalable, high-performance digital solutions for startups, SMEs, and enterprises globally. From custom web and mobile applications to API integrations and cloud-based systems, we leverage modern technologies and agile methodologies to provide secure and future-ready solutions. Mindlox serves diverse industries such as fintech, healthcare, e-commerce, logistics, and education, ensuring technology adapts to solve specific business challenges. Our collaboration-focused and innovative approach empowers clients to accelerate business growth and achieve impactful outcomes.
Role Description
This is a full-time on-site role for a Trainee Software Developer located in Lahore. As a Trainee Software Developer, your responsibilities will include collaborating with the development team to contribute to the design, coding, and implementation of software applications. You will assist in developing back-end systems, participate in code reviews, debug and troubleshoot issues, and continuously improve your programming skills by learning from experienced developers. Training and mentorship will be provided to help you grow and contribute effectively to ongoing projects.
Qualifications
Foundational knowledge in Computer Science and Software Development methodologies.
Proficiency in Back-End Web Development and Programming concepts.
Understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles.
Eagerness to learn and adopt new technologies and best practices in software development.
Critical thinking, problem-solving skills, and the ability to work effectively in a collaborative team environment.
Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field is preferred.
Time: 6pm - 3am

Company: ExertLogics
Location: Lake City | Onsite
Timings: 03:00 PM – 12:00 AM
Working Days: Monday to Friday
ExertLogics is looking for a passionate and creative WordPress Frontend Developer Intern to join our growing team. This is a great opportunity for fresh graduates or individuals starting their career in web development to gain hands-on industry experience in a fast-paced software company.
Responsibilities:
Assist in developing and customizing WordPress websites
Convert Figma/PSD designs into responsive WordPress pages
Work with themes, plugins, and page builders (Elementor, WPBakery, etc.)
Optimize websites for performance and responsiveness
Fix UI/UX issues and ensure cross-browser compatibility
Collaborate with backend developers and designers
Requirements:
BS in Computer Science, Software Engineering, IT, or related field
0 to 6 months Exp (Fresh graduates are encouraged to apply)
Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript
Understanding of WordPress structure, themes, and plugins
Familiarity with responsive design principles
Good problem-solving and communication skills
Benefits & Perks:
Collaborative Environment
Learning Support
High-Quality Lunch Facility
Tax-Free Salary
Opportunities to Growth
Send your resume directly to: hr@exertlogics.com
Simply reach us at WhatsApp: +92 326 0363688
Requirements added by the job poster
• Bachelor's Degree
• Commute to this job’s location
